turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hi , albert . how are you ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hey , good to see you .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: it's good to see you too . so , i know the nurse told you about dax . i'd like to tell dax a little bit about you .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , albert is a 62-year-old male , with a past medical history significant for depression , type 2 diabetes , and kidney transplant , who is here today for emergency room follow-up .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , i got a notification that you were in the emergency room , but , but what were you there for ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: well , i , uh , i was n't really , uh , staying on top of my , uh , blood sugar readings , and i felt kinda woozy over the weekend . and i was little concerned , and my wife wanted to take me in and just have me checked out .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , and was it , in fact , high ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah , it was .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . did you ... were you admitted to the hospital ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and , uh , are you ... did they see a reason , as to why it was elevated ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , yeah . my mother was actually in the hospital the last week. she had a bit of a fall and had to do a hip replacement. she's feeling better now but we have been just grabbing meals at the cafeteria or picking up fast food on our way home and i just really was n't monitoring what i was eating .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . that's sorry to hear . and are you feeling better now ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , actually , when we got home from the , uh , f- from the visit , i felt a lot better .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and since then , have you been following your diet pretty closely ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . 'cause we do n't wan na end up in the hospitaltoo

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . um , okay . and , so , before that happened , how are you doing with your diet ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , during the week , i've been fine , 'cause i've been very busy . on the weekends , doing things . you're seeing people . you're having people over . it's , i- not , not as consistent on the weekend .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , is there a way that you think that that can improve ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , s- stop eating .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . well , let's talk about your , your kidney transplant . how are-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . you doing ? you're taking immunotherapy meds ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah . i've , i've been pretty diligent about it , following doctor's orders , so it's been , it's been pretty good so far .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and , and y- the last time i saw that you saw dr. reyes , was about three weeks ago , and everything seemed to be fine .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: that's correct .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: your kidney function is good .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . and in terms of your depression , how are you , how are you doing ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and it's been about a , a tough , ugh , year-and-a-half or so , but i've been pretty good with it . i , i have my moments , but i- as long as i find some time to relax , at least in the afternoon , then , then it seems to work out okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so , i know that we've kind of talked about holding off on medical therapy-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . 'cause you're on so many other meds .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , is that something that you wan na revisit , or do you wan na look into therapy , or do you think anything's needed right now ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: uh , i think i probably wan na shy away from any therapy . my , my wife got me into meditation recently and , and , uh , i , i find that relaxing . so , i think i'd like to continue that , at least for a couple more months and see how it goes .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . that sounds good . all right . well , i know the nurse did a quick review of systems with you , when you-

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: . checked in . do you have any symptoms , any chest pain or shortness of breath ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: none whatsoever .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: lightheadedness ? dizziness ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: no .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: no ? okay . um , and i just wan na go ahead and do a quick physical exam .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . show me the vital signs . so , looking here right now , your vital signs look great . you know , your pulse ox is great . your h- your blood pressure and heart rate are right where they should be .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , i'm gon na just check you out , and i'm gon na let you know what i find . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . so , on your physical exam , everything looks really good . um , you do n't appear in any distress at this time . i do n't appreciate any carotid bruits . your heart , on your heart exam , i do hear that slight 2/6 systolic ejection murmur , but we heard that in the past .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: your lungs sound nice and clear , but i notice , you know , 1+ , uh , edema in your lower extremities . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , so , let's go ahead . i wan na look at some of your results . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: sure .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . show me the glucose . so , right now , your blood sugar is about 162 . have you eaten before you came in here ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: i did not .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . all right . um , hey , dragon . show me the diabetes labs . okay . i'm looking at your diabetes labs . you know , your hemoglobin a1c is about 8 , and that's a , that's a little high .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , not only , you know , have your blood sugars , were they high that one day , they were , they've been a little elevated .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , we'll talk about , you know , how to go ahead and , and fix that . okay ? so , let me talk a little bit about my assessment and my plan for you .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so , for your first problem , this hyperglycemia , you know , i wan na go ahead and increase your lantus to 20 units at night . okay ? i want you to continue your monitor your blood sugar and let me know how they're running 'cause we might have to adjust that further .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay ? um , and i wan na order another hemoglobin a1c in a couple months . hey , dragon . order a hemoglobin a1c . for your next problem , your depression , i think you're doing a great job with your current strategies with the meditation . we will hold off on medication or therapy at this time , and you know to call me if you need anything , right ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: mm-hmm .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay . and for your third problem , your kidney transplant , your kidney function looks stable . uh , i'm gon na just have you go back to dr. reyes , to manage all of your immunosuppression medications .

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: um , and then , he knows to reach out to me if he needs anything . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: you got it .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: all right . well , the nurse will be in soon to check you out . okay ?

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: perfect .

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: hey , dragon . finalize the note .
